title: Research Execution Pipeline Capability & Limitations Audit
authority_notes: Status applies to operational-boundary claims about the pipeline itself — grounded in repository EGS-1.0.0-proposal.2 + EAE docs/code.
Does NOT promote any 2019 F-450 REL-REG edge, torque, fastener, connector, or geometry claim to VERIFIED.
Saturation percentages below are RESEARCH_ESTIMATE_NOT_MEASURED — not instrumented coverage scores.

promotion_lock.condition: Physical evidence ingestion pipeline (byte parsing, hashing, token-anchor extraction) must be connected before real-world promotion

hard_human_api_limits: Paid paywalls (e.g. Helm Inc. Motorcraft Service)

dimensions.name: Primary Evidence Acquisition
dimensions.verdict: Partially. Fully automated for public OEM/Government records; gated for commercial & physical evidence.
dimensions.mitigation: SOURCE_DISCOVERED handoff to human/purchasing agent or credentialed crawler
dimensions.what_works: Discover/index/extract from public Tier A/B sources (NHTSA, Ford BBAS guides, USPTO, public TSBs, open parts APIs, open CAD repos) when URLs are real and reachable.
dimensions.bottleneck: Cannot independently bypass commercial paywalls or dealer service logins.
dimensions.operational_boundary: Pipeline pushes documents to SOURCE_DISCOVERED; SOURCE_ACQUIRED requires crawler+API keys or human-in-the-loop byte handoff.

dimensions.name: Assertion Extraction
dimensions.verdict: High accuracy on structured text & tables; requires OCR verification on complex engineering drawings.
dimensions.primary_failure_vector: Visual ambiguity in scanned PDFs / EWDs
dimensions.mitigation: Token-anchor cross-referencing & OCR validation before ASSERTION_VERIFIED
dimensions.what_works: Deterministic parse of text, parts catalogs, explicit workshop tables into EGS claims.
dimensions.bottleneck: Spatial routing from non-vector EWD PDFs and multi-view assembly drawings.
dimensions.operational_boundary: Extracted claims start as ASSERTION_EXTRACTED; ASSERTION_VERIFIED requires validation rule (e.g. token anchors in source PDF).

dimensions.name: Exact-Vehicle Isolation
dimensions.verdict: Yes. One of the pipeline's strongest capabilities.
dimensions.primary_failure_vector: Human pressure to borrow near-config data
dimensions.mitigation: Hard configuration locks on CFGCOMP- nodes; CROSS_CONFIGURATION_COMPARISON + NOT_INHERITED
dimensions.what_works: Pass 1 Scope Lock refuses merging 2018 F-250 Crew Cab 4x4 into CFG-2019-F450-REG-CAB-4X2-60CA-DRW.
dimensions.operational_boundary: Cross-model/year data isolated; inheritance explicitly blocked on authoritative edges.

dimensions.name: Contradiction Resolution
dimensions.verdict: Yes, by design. Logs conflicts rather than guessing.
dimensions.mitigation: Force CONTRADICTED status, PROCEDURE_GENERATION_NOT_AUTHORIZED, open KG-XXX
dimensions.what_works: Conflicting assertions retained as structural evidence with conflicting_assertions arrays.
dimensions.operational_boundary: No majority-vote blend; contradiction blocks procedure generation.

dimensions.name: Graph Generation Efficiency
dimensions.verdict: Yes via automated schema templating; validation requires structured parsing engines.
dimensions.mitigation: Strict JSON-Schema + egs_v1.validate at intake; reject unlinked assertions
dimensions.what_works: Template CFGCOMP-/IFACE-/claim structures from raw assertions without hand-writing thousands of nodes.
dimensions.bottleneck: Unbounded LLMs invent plausible edges if not schema-gated.
dimensions.operational_boundary: Failed structural syntax or unlinked assertions rejected at intake.

dimensions.name: Complete Assembly Representation
dimensions.verdict: Incrementally. Evidence-backed assembly — not an artificial complete-looking model.
dimensions.primary_failure_vector: Expecting 100% digital saturation from web search
dimensions.mitigation: Declare Research Saturation → Physical Acquisition Plan (Sprint 7)
dimensions.what_works: Stitch CFGCOMP- passports through IFACE- into multi-layer twin planes.
dimensions.bottleneck: Public search cannot yield internal cavity geometry, exact harness routing, stamping thickness.
dimensions.operational_boundary: Never fabricate completeness; hand off to physical acquisition where digital evidence is exhausted.

public_external_visual_and_oem_parts.notes: Estimate only — not a hashed evidence coverage score

internal_cavity_and_harness_routing.notes: Estimate only — physical scan/teardown required for progress

missing_evidence: Direct API integration with commercial OEM manual portals (Helm Inc.) for SOURCE_DISCOVERED → SOURCE_ACQUIRED byte conversion
Connected token-anchor assertion verification against ingested WSM/EWD PDF bytes for VEH-000001 / CFG-000001
Physical Acquisition Plan Sprint 7 execution artifacts (scan/teardown) — template only until saturation declared on a subsystem

risks.summary: Infinite web-search loops seeking 100% internal geometry
risks.mitigation: Declare Research Saturation; trigger Physical Acquisition Plan

risks.summary: Inserting ASSERTION_EXTRACTED fastener/torque without token anchors
risks.mitigation: ASSERTION_VERIFIED requires validation rule; keep PROCEDURE_GENERATION_NOT_AUTHORIZED
